description: An aerospace engineer needs to configure a heavy-lift launch vehicle by adding solid rocket boosters (SRBs) to a core stage. OpenVSP is open with a blank workspace. A specification document is located at /home/ga/Desktop/upgrade_spec.txt. Read this document to understand the geometry sizing, spatial offsetting, and rotational symmetry requirements for the Core and SRB components. Build the multi-stage rocket cluster exactly as specified using Fuselage/Pod components, apply Rotational Symmetry to the SRB, and save the model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/heavy_launch_vehicle.vsp3.
